name: matrix-worker
description: Matrix homeserver running on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.spec:extract: bun run spec:extract:markdown && bun run spec:extract:openapi
scripts.spec:coverage: bun run spec:coverage:markdown && bun run spec:coverage:openapi && bun run spec:coverage:complement
scripts.complement:full: bun run complement:run && bun run complement:analyze
scripts.complement:full:fast: bun run complement:run:fast && bun run complement:analyze
scripts.complement:full:fastest: DIRTY=1 bun run complement:run:fast && bun run complement:analyze
scripts.lint:strict-core: bun run check:no-direct-effect-run && oxlint src/matrix/application/domain-error.ts src/matrix/application/effect-debug.ts src/matrix/application/effect-runtime.ts src/matrix/application/logging.ts src/matrix/application/features/presence src/matrix/application/features/typing src/matrix/application/features/to-device src/matrix/application/room-service.ts src/matrix/application/room-validation.ts src/matrix/application/room-membership-policy.ts src/matrix/application/member-transition-service.ts src/runtime/cloudflare/matrix-repositories.ts src/services/database.ts src/workflows/RoomJoinWorkflow.ts src/types/workflows.ts src/api/presence.ts src/api/typing.ts src/api/to-device.ts src/api/keys.ts src/api/keys-contracts.ts src/api/push-contracts.ts --deny-warnings
